name: Maruzen Co., Ltd.
summary: Maruzen Co., Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of commercial kitchen equipment. The company offers fryers, grillers, Gyoza cookers, ramen boilers, frozen/raw noodle boilers, electric/IH noodle boilers, griddles, gas table stoves, gas burners, steamers, rice cookers, and water pressure rice washers, as well as gas and Chinese range products. It serves restaurant chains, hotels, convenience stores, supermarkets, and other customers. The company sells its products in Japan, Australia, China, Hong Kong, Indonesia, Korea, Malaysia, the Philippines, Singapore, the United States, Vietnam, Cambodia, Myanmar, etc. Maruzen Co., Ltd. was founded in 1961 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
